docket_entries.description: DECLARATION TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO ADD DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, LILY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2024 - CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TIME TO AMEND AND SERVE THE CLAIM TO INCLUDE CR&P INC. AS CODEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF LILY TONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL TSEYREF IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED APR-24-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TSEYREF, DANIEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF LILY TONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL TSEYREF IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0.0 SERVED MAR-18-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TSEYREF, DANIEL
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,474.51 FILED BY TONG, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT TSEYREF, DANIEL CHOSEN ROOTER & PLUMBING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED APR-24-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHOSEN ROOTER & PLUMBING, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,474.51 FILED BY TONG, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT TSEYREF, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF LILY TONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL TSEYREF IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LILY TONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL TSEYREF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHOSEN ROOTER & PLUMBING, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL TSEYREF. PLAINTIFF IS STATED SHE IS GOING TO SEEK REIMBURSEMENT FROM DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
